# Start

> Your coding assistant.

Start is a cross-platform coding assistant for working on software projects with AI agents. It gives developers a focused workspace for asking questions, editing files, reviewing changes, and moving code toward a pull request.

## What you can do

- Use multiple AI models and switch between them for different tasks.
- Choose thinking or effort levels when a model supports deeper reasoning.
- Queue follow-up prompts so work can continue without losing your next thought.
- Work across multiple workspaces and conversations.
- Run parallel agents on separate threads of work.
- Attach file context so the assistant understands the code you choose.
- Review file changes in a diff viewer before committing.
- Configure providers, keys, models, and preferences in settings.
- Bring your own provider keys and keep control of the services you use.

## Website

- Landing page: https://start.intelligence.one
- Releases: https://github.com/sasicodes/start/releases
- Privacy: https://start.intelligence.one/privacy
- Terms: https://start.intelligence.one/terms
